_comment: LayoutOS material price reference — UPDATE THIS FILE WHEN PRICES CHANGE

_updates.2026-04-16: osb_7_16_sheet 14.55→13 (add osb_sheet alias); zip_wall_sheet 40.20→45; zip_roof_sheet 52.36→60; add metal_panel_per_lf alias; add premium_plywood_sheet; add man_door_solid/9lite/fanlite; add window_single_hung/sliding

_notes.lp_smartside_sheet: LP SmartSide 8in OC panel, 4x8 sheet, SKU 509-095
_notes.osb_7_16_sheet: 7/16 OSB sheathing, 4x8 sheet — legacy key, use osb_sheet going forward
_notes.osb_sheet: 7/16 OSB sheathing, 4x8 sheet — VOLATILE, verify before quoting. UPDATE 2026-04-16: $14.55→$13
_notes.vapor_barrier_roll: 500 sqft coverage per roll, 15% overlap factor
_notes.house_wrap_roll: Tyvek or equiv, ~1000 sqft per roll
_notes.fir_strip_per_lf: 1x3 or 2x3 fir furring strip, 24in OC — REQUIRED under metal panels over OSB or Zip. Cannot screw metal to OSB directly.
_notes.shingle_square: GAF Architectural per bundle (33.33 sqft) — price per SQUARE (100sqft)
_notes.metal_panel_sqft: 26ga rib panel per sqft — legacy key, use metal_panel_per_lf
_notes.metal_panel_per_lf: 26ga rib panel, 3ft wide, ordered to slope/wall length. Metal panels are NOT 4x8 sheets — order to length. Standard lengths: 8, 10, 12, 14, 16ft. UPDATE 2026-04-16
_notes.premium_plywood_sheet: 3/4in BC plywood, 4x8 sheet — shelving upgrade over standard OSB. UPDATE 2026-04-16: added
_notes.man_door_complete: Legacy key — use man_door_solid, man_door_9lite, man_door_fanlite going forward
_notes.man_door_solid: 36x80 Primed Steel prehung — JELD-WEN THDJW166100275 (LH) / THDJW166100278 (RH) — Home Depot — installed all-in
_notes.man_door_9lite: 36x80 9-Lite Steel prehung — JELD-WEN — Home Depot — SKU VERIFY — installed all-in
_notes.man_door_fanlite: 36x80 Fan-Lite Steel prehung — JELD-WEN — Home Depot — SKU VERIFY — installed all-in
_notes.window_24x27_complete: Legacy key — use window_single_hung or window_sliding going forward
_notes.window_single_hung: 24x30 Single Hung Vinyl — Project Source SKU 5013341551 — Lowes — installed all-in
_notes.window_sliding: 36x36 Sliding Vinyl — Project Source SKU 5013341567 — Lowes — installed all-in
_notes.garage_door_seal_9ft: 9ft door seal strip — white or brown, same price. 3 per door (bottom + 2 sides)
_notes.garage_door_keyed_handle: Exterior keyed entry handle — without it door opens from inside only
_notes.framed_opening_8x7: Framed opening 8x7 — labor + header materials, client supplies door
_notes.framed_opening_12x7: Framed opening 12x7 — LVL header, load-bearing note applies
_notes.framed_opening_16x7: Framed opening 16x7 — double LVL, structural upgrade likely
